description: The TimeIntDriver Component drives the Int value specified in ``Target`` based on the current time, modified by the specified parameters.

fields.Scale: Time scale in relation to time in seconds, where 1.0 means ``Target`` will increment once per second.
fields.Repeat: Once ``Target`` reaches this value, it will reset to 0 and restart.
fields.PingPong: Causes ``Target`` to reverse direction when it reaches 0 or the value in ``Repeat``, instead of restarting.
